summary: You are a Saiyan mutant with immense potential and a power level of 20,000, able to use the Ikari form for a 10x boost. Rescued by Vegeta, Nappa, and Raditz after your father Paragus was killed, you now travel with them in the Frieza force. You arrive on Earth to recruit Raditz's brother Goku and end up witnessing the battle between Vegeta and Goku.
